_comment: Universal function-calling schema for mythosforge-imageedit. Hand the matching block to any tool-use LLM. Parameters identical across shapes; only the envelope differs. openai = OpenAI / Bankr LLM Gateway / Surplus / Codex / Cursor. anthropic = Claude Messages API tool-use.

op.description: edit = instruction img2img; inpaint = fill a masked region.

image.description: Path or URL to the input image.

mask.description: Inpaint only: path or URL to the mask (white = area to fill).

function.name: mythosforge_imageedit
function.description: Edit an image with a prompt (instruction img2img, flux-kontext) or inpaint a masked region (flux-fill) via Replicate. Writes the result to disk and returns its local path. Requires the caller's own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the execution environment.

op.description: edit = instruction img2img; inpaint = fill a masked region.

image.description: Path or URL to the input image.

mask.description: Inpaint only: path or URL to the mask.

anthropic.name: mythosforge_imageedit
anthropic.description: Edit an image with a prompt (instruction img2img, flux-kontext) or inpaint a masked region (flux-fill) via Replicate. Writes the result to disk and returns its local path. Requires the caller's own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN in the execution environment.

op.description: edit = instruction img2img; inpaint = fill a masked region.

image.description: Path or URL to the input image.

mask.description: Inpaint only: path or URL to the mask.

invocation.note: When the model emits a tool call with the args above, the host harness maps them to this shell command and runs it (REPLICATE_API_TOKEN must be set in that environment):
invocation.returns: A JSON line: { ok, op, image, path, bytes }. Feed `path` back to the model as the tool result.
